title: The difference between eggless and egg-free — and why it matters in Westmead
summary:
"Egg-free option" means eggs are elsewhere in the kitchen. Eggless means every cake, every batch, every order — no exceptions, ever. That's not the same thing.

At Num Nums Bakery on Wigram Street, Harris Park, every cake in the bakery is eggless. All 15 flavours. Buttercream, fondant, and ganache. 6-inch to 16-inch. Jain families, vegetarian households, and halal-observant families from Westmead, Granville, and Parramatta don't need to ask — the default is already them.

Starts at $39.99. 48-hour notice. Pickup from Harris Park, less than 10 minutes from Westmead. WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: Jain vegetarian eggless bakery Westmead Parramatta Granville
eggless vs egg-free option bakery near Parramatta
